summary: NEXUS v4.4 Phase 2 Testing Complete - All 21 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. Fixed critical route ordering bug in P2P bidding endpoints. ProductHunt integration active (45.5% health score), Admin Analytics Dashboard with charts working, GitHub OAuth page functional, P2P Auction Bidding with real-time Socket.IO updates verified.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed route ordering: moved /products/{product_id}/bids and /products/{product_id}/bid routes BEFORE /products/{product_id} to avoid route conflict
/app/backend/server.py - Added /users/{user_id}/bids route before /users/{user_id} for same reason
/app/backend/tests/test_phase2_v44.py - Created Phase 2 test suite with 21 tests
seed_data_creation: Test auction products created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully tested and verified. Route ordering bug fixed for P2P bidding endpoints. All new features working: ProductHunt integration (active), Admin Analytics Dashboard (charts rendering), GitHub OAuth page (connection flow ready), P2P Auction Bidding (real-time Socket.IO updates working).

features_working: User Growth chart with bar visualization

ui_features: Live Auction widget on product page
Recent Bids list with real-time updates

bugs_fixed.issue: P2P bidding endpoints returning 404 - route ordering conflict
bugs_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI routes /products/{product_id}/bids and /products/{product_id}/bid were defined AFTER /products/{product_id}, causing the generic route to match first
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved bid-related routes before the generic product detail route (lines 765-870)
bugs_fixed.verification: All 21 backend tests now pass, bid placement working in UI

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/phase2_auction_product.png - Auction product with Live Auction widget
.screenshots/phase2_bid_placed.png - Successful bid placement with real-time update
